PROGRAM SCOPE
The biggest ever technological advancement this century has witnessed is making machines to think and act like human, engaging the science of Artificial Intelligence, powered by Data.

AI driven by Data will be dominant in every aspect of human life with the scope for its application becoming limitless. Autonomous Vehicles, Virtual Assistants (Alexa, Siri), Domestic Assistants (maid robots), are some of the existing examples, while many are being developed every single day.

The field of AI & DS is emerging as the most promising one for young engineers who have a flair for data and visualization.
LEARNING SCOPE
Students studying this program will be able to design, develop and apply AI and DS based solutions to real world business challenges. The students will know to develop out insights with intellectual curiosity, by learning various technologies including Deep learning, Computer Vision, Data Science, Predictive Analytics, AR/VR, Natural Language Processing and Robotics, Software Technologies, OOPs and Database Management Systems.
CAREER PROGRESSION
With rapidly increasing focus on AI & DS by the industry, the students have abundant scope for employment in various industries including Healthcare, Travel & Transportation, Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) as Data Scientist, Data Analyst, Machine Learning Architect, Software Developers.
VISION
To build a conducive academic and research environment in the stream of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science for enabling global education, research and entrepreneurship.
MISSION
Update and enrich the curriculum by integrating global trends and   technological advancements to ensure the academic excellence.
Promote a research-driven environment by providing access to state-of-the-art infrastructure with emerging technologies.
Empower the faculty through continuous upskilling, international collaborations, and active research engagement to provide globally competent education.
Encourage student-centric, industry-aligned learning that nurtures innovation and entrepreneurship activities for solving real-world and societal challenges.
PROGRAM DETAILS
Program Educational Objectives
PEO1:
Build a progressive professional career in industry, or pursue higher education, or succeed as an entrepreneur.
PEO2:
Excel in cutting-edge technologies of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science to address real world challenges.
PEO3:
Exhibit professional ethics, involvement in team work in their profession and contributing to the advancement of society.
Program Outcomes
PO1:
Engineering Knowledge:
Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems.
PO2:
Problem Analysis:
Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development.
PO3:
Design/Development of Solutions:
Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required.
PO4:
Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems:
Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions.
PO5:
Engineering Tool Usage:
Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems.
PO6:
The Engineer and The World:
Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment.
PO7:
Ethics:
Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws.
PO8:
Individual and Collaborative Teamwork:
Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams.
PO9:
Communication:
Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences.
PO10:
Project Management and Finance:
Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments.
PO11:
Life-Long Learning:
Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change.
Program Specific Outcomes
PSO1:
Apply programming, problem-solving, and hardware integration skills with AI and data science to design intelligent, secure and efficient systems.
PSO2:
Develop an AI-driven application by exploring optimized coding competencies using predictive modeling and data analytics technologies.

RESEARCH
Sri Eshwar encourages faculty members to seek support and secure research funds from industry and various funding agencies such as DST, AICTE, TNSCCT, MHRD, CSIR, DRDO, ISTE, and others to develop research facilities and carry out research projects. The institute also supports this effort by providing seed funding to departments to establish research laboratories and promote research.

Dr.L.Raja
B.E. M.E. Ph.D
D.O.J : 27.07.2020
Areas of Specialization
Sensor and Adhoc networks, Optimization in Communication Networks, Wireless networks and Cybersecurity
Dr. L. Raja is a senior academician and researcher currently serving as Professor, Department of Artificial Intelligence & Data Science. He holds a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, an M.E. in Applied Electronics from Kongu Engineering College, and a B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering from K.S. Rangasamy College of Technology. He has established a strong research profile with high-quality scholarly output, comprising 16 SCI-indexed and Scopus-indexed international journal publications, 10 Scopus-indexed international conference publications (IEEE/AIP), and 4 Scopus-indexed international book chapters. He has made significant contributions to applied research and innovation, with 11 published Indian patents. He has successfully organized and completed three consecutive SERB and ISRO sponsored seminars worth ₹3 lakhs. In recognition of his sustained learning and academic engagement, he has received multiple national recognitions such as NPTEL Discipline Star, NPTEL Believer, NPTEL Domain Scholar, and NPTEL Motivated Learner awards across different academic years. A strong advocate of continuous professional development, he has consistently secured Elite, Elite-Silver, and Elite-Gold grades and Top-5% ranks in NPTEL proctored examinations. He actively contributes to the academic community as a Senior Member of the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) and holds memberships in several national and international professional bodies such as IETE, ISTE, and IAENG. He also serves as a reviewer for reputed international journals, including Springer journals such as Wireless Networks, Scientific Reports, Cluster Computing, and the International Journal of Communication Systems. His core academic and research expertise spans Mobile Communication, Wireless Ad-hoc and Sensor Networks, Embedded and IoT Systems, Communication Networks, and Optimization Techniques, with a strong focus on intelligent and data-driven networking frameworks.
Dr.K.Mohaideen Abdul Kadhar
B.E.M.Tech. Ph.D
D.O.J : 14.06.2023
Areas of Specialization
Control System, Computer Vision, Artificial Intelligence, Wireless sensor networks.
Dr. K. Mohaideen Abdul Kadhar earned his B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering from Bharath
Institute of Science and Technology, Tamilnadu, India, in 2005, followed by an M. Tech in Control and
Instrumentation from Thiagarajar College of Engineering, Madurai, in 2009. He completed his PhD at Thiagarajar
College of Engineering from 2011 to 2015. Dr. Kadhar received both junior and senior research fellowships under the
Maulana Azad National Fellowship (MANF) Scheme from the University Grants Commission (UGC), Delhi. Dr.Kadhar
has authored more than 15 papers in high-impact factor journals and has published two books focusing on
evolutionary optimization, robust controller design, and industrial vision systems. He has delivered numerous guest
lectures on the application of Evolutionary Algorithms for various engineering applications and has chaired sessions
at national and international conferences. Dr. Kadhar serves as a reviewer and guest editor for esteemed
international journals including IEEE, IEEE Access, Applied Soft Computing, Soft Computing, and Artificial
Intelligence Review journals. He has offered consultancy work for various industries, such as Sakthi Auto
Components, Bi-metal Bearings, Syrma Technologies, and mokSa.ai, developing machine vision systems to meet
their specific requirements. He has filed and published more than 5 patents, with one patent granted by the Indian
Patent Office. His research interests include the development of new evolutionary algorithms, engineering
optimization, multi-objective optimization, robust controller design, signal processing, deep learning , computer vision,
data analytics, and wireless sensor networks.
Dr.M. Mohammed Mustafa
B.Tech., M.E., MBA., Ph.D
Areas of Specialization
Wireless Sensor Networks, Security, Data Science
Dr. M. Mohammed Mustafa (B.Tech (IT), M.E (CSE), MBA, Ph.D) is a renowned academician, researcher, and an academic leader with more than 17 years’ experience in engineering education. He is currently a Professor and Head of Department and works in Data Science, Machine Learning, Wireless Sensor Networks, IoT, Mobile Computing, and Network Security. In 2019, he received a Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering at Anna University with a specialization in the Wireless Sensor Networks and also an M.E. in Computer Science Engineering, MBA in HR and Finance with SLET in lectureship.
Dr. Mustafa has also contributed much to research works by writing many articles in SCI and SCOPUS indexed journals, such as Springer, other publishers that have a good reputation internationally. He has also presented his work in IEEE international conferences and published it in IEEE Xplore. He has also written book chapters in some of the most known international publications and is a peer reviewer in renowned journals. He is also an indexed researcher in the Web of Science, Scopus, and ORCID and was a Ph.D. examiner and viva voice panel. His work mainly deals with energy-efficient communication, IoT-based, and wireless body sensor network, and applied machine learning.
Dr. Mustafa has been a key participant in the processes of NBA and NAAC accreditation as the IQAC and Program Coordinator, guaranteeing the quality standards of the institution. He has spearheaded departmental Research and Development, coordinated the activities of the Institution Innovation Council, and organized national and international conferences, seminars, workshops and innovation activities. He has also been employed in important university roles such as University Examination Representative and Central Valuation contributor with Anna University.
A successful facilitator, he has supervised more than 230 undergraduate and postgraduate student projects and always recorded high academic outcomes, including being recognised as having 100% pass rates in theory subjects. His portfolio categories are Data Science, Data Visualization, Machine Learning, Computer Networks, IoT, ERP Systems, Java, and Python programming. He engages in student mentoring actively to get them ready to placements and professional careers with a combination of innovative teaching-learning strategies and practical learning techniques.
Dr. Mustafa has various professional qualifications such as AI for Future Workforce (Intel), Oracle Certified Professional- Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, Cisco Programming Essentials in Python, and various Data Science, Generative AI, NLP, IoT, and Network Security certifications. As a person with a great combination of academic perfection, research novelty, accreditation experience, and student guidance, Dr. M. Mohammed Mustafa still does a lot to improve the further development of engineering education and research based on technology.
